sqlCommands.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID,UWYr,Crcy,Flex2,Division,Flex5,Flex8,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4,Amt5,Amt6,Amt7,Amt8) (select KeyID,UWYr,Crcy,Flex2,Division,Flex5,Flex8,ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt1,0)),2),ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt2,0)),2),ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt3,0)),2),ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt4,0)),2),ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt5,0)),2),ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt6,0)),2),ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt7,0)),2),ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt8,0)),2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 = 'pass2' group by KeyID,UWYr,Crcy,Flex2,Division,Flex5,Flex8)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Yr,Co,Crcy,Flex6,Flex7,GL,GLdesc,Flex2,TP,TPname,PC,Flex5,Flex9,Flex8,TTY,Flex4,Amt1,Amt2) (select KeyID + '-data2', Yr,Co,Crcy,Flex6,Flex7,GL,GLdesc,Flex2,TP,TPname,PC,Flex5,Flex9,Flex8,TTY,Flex4,ROUND(SUM(Amt1),2),ROUND(SUM(Amt2),2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Yr,Co,Crcy,Flex6,Flex7,GL,GLdesc,Flex2,TP,TPname,PC,Flex5,Flex9,Flex8,TTY,Flex4)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co like '_999'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL >= '5010000' and GL <= '5349999'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0 and Amt4 = 0 and Amt5 = 0 and Amt6 = 0 and Amt7 = 0 and Amt8 = 0
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY <> '822' and not GL like '4%'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not TP = ''
update TransX set Qtr = Qtr + 1000000 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'P1'
update TransX set Qtr = Qtr + 2000000 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'P2'
update TransX set Qtr = Qtr + 3000000 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'P3'
update TransX set Qtr = Qtr + 4000000 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'P4'

Update x set Flex9 = '7' + m1.field2 + m2.field2 + x.Flex2 + 'N' + (case when x.TP like 'F%' then 'A' else 'T' end) + 'P0' from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables m1 on m1.Field1 = x.Co and m1.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m1.ID = 'PC' and m1.Descr = 'Co' inner join Misc_Tables m2 on m2.Field1 = x.Flex5 and m2.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m2.ID = 'PC' and m2.Descr = 'Product' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex7 = REPLACE(m.Name,' & ULAE','') from TransX t inner join mapkeys m on t.flex6 = m.mapkey where keyID = '[batchID]'

Update x set Flex8 = x.Flex2 + '-' + m1.field3 + '-' + x.Flex5, Division = m1.field2 from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables m1 on m1.Field1 = x.Co and m1.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m1.ID = 'PC' and m1.Descr = 'Co' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update x set Flex5 = m2.field2 from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables m2 on m2.Field1 = x.Flex5 and m2.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m2.ID = 'PC' and m2.Descr = 'Product' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set TPname = CASE WHEN TP = '' THEN '3rd' WHEN SUBSTRING(TP,1,1) = 'F' THEN 'FFH' ELSE 'ODY' END where KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and amt1 = 0
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Flex3 = substring(m2.MapKey,4,1) + ' ' + m2.Name from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges m1 on Co >= FromGL and Co <= ThruGL inner join MapKeys m2 on m1.MapKey = m2.MapKey where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m1.MapKey like 'C2%'
Update TransX set Flex4 = CASE WHEN TTY IN ('','821','822') THEN 'Incurred' ELSE 'Other' END where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex1 = 'CTA' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL < '4000000'
update TransX set Flex1 = 'P&L' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL > '4000000'
update TransX set Flex2 = '4 FX Hedge', Flex4 = 'M3-3-6-06-B-2' from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges m1 on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m1.MapKey = 'M3-3-6-06-B-2'
update TransX set Flex2 = '3 Other Expense', Flex4 = 'M3-3-6-06-C' from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges m1 on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m1.MapKey = 'M3-3-6-06-C'

update TransX set Flex2 = '2 Realized Gains/Losses', Flex4 = 'M3-3-6-06-B' from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges m1 on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m1.MapKey = 'M3-3-6-06-B' and TTY >= '990' and Flex2 is NULL

update TransX set Flex2 = '1 Investment Income', Flex4 = 'M3-3-6-06-A' from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges m1 on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m1.MapKey = 'M3-3-6-06-A' and TTY >= '990'

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, CC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, TTY, TransCode, ProdCode, AccYr, ReinName, ReinLoc, Stat, CatCode, Broker, RiskTerr, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Co, GL, Crcy, '' as TP, PC, CC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, TTY, TransCode, ProdCode, AccYr, ReinName, ReinLoc, Stat, CatCode, Broker, RiskTerr, PTF, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2, round(-Amt3,2) as Amt3,'50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '40' and substring(GL,4,2) <> '89' and TP <> '')

update TransX set Flex2 = '1 Investment Income', Flex4 = 'M3-3-6-06-A-1' from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges m1 on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m1.MapKey = 'M3-3-6-06-A-1' and Flex2 is NULL

update TransX set Flex2 = '2 Realized Gains/Losses', Flex4 = 'M3-3-6-06-B-1' from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges m1 on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m1.MapKey = 'M3-3-6-06-B-1' and Flex2 is NULL

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, CC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, TTY, TransCode, ProdCode, AccYr, ReinName, ReinLoc, Stat, CatCode, Broker, RiskTerr, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Co, GL, Crcy, '' as TP, PC, CC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, TTY, TransCode, ProdCode, AccYr, ReinName, ReinLoc, Stat, CatCode, Broker, RiskTerr, PTF, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2, round(-Amt3,2) as Amt3,'40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '50' and substring(GL,4,2) <> '89' and TP <> '')
update TransX set Flex6 = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex5 = 'TP reclass for Falcon' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set GLdesc = 'zz=GLSU_Description(F2)' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex1 = cast(ABS(Amt1) as varchar(255)) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex2 = cast(ABS(Amt2) as varchar(255)) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex3 = cast(ABS(Amt3) as varchar(255)) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 = 0 or Amt2 = 0 or Amt3 = 0)
update TransX set BusCat = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'
update TransX set Flex5 = (case when Flex2 is NULL then 'no' else 'yes' end) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID,Yr,Period,Co,GL,TP,PC,BusCat,TTY,UWYr,Crcy,Flex2,Division,Flex5,Flex8,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4,Amt5,Amt6,Amt7,Amt8,Flex1) (Select KeyID,Yr,Period,Co,GL,TP,PC,BusCat,TTY,UWYr,Crcy,Flex2,Division,Flex5,Flex8,ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt1,0)),2),ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt2,0)),2),ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt3,0)),2),ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt4,0)),2),ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt5,0)),2),ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt6,0)),2),ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt7,0)),2),ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt8,0)),2),'pass3' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' group by KeyID,Yr,Period,Co,GL,TP,PC,BusCat,TTY,UWYr,Crcy,Flex2,Division,Flex5,Flex8)

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, CC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, TTY, TransCode, ProdCode, AccYr, ReinName, ReinLoc, Stat, CatCode, Broker, RiskTerr, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, CC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, TTY, TransCode, ProdCode, AccYr, ReinName, ReinLoc, Stat, CatCode, Broker, RiskTerr, PTF, round(-sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(coalesce(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2,  round(-sum(coalesce(Amt3,0)),2) as Amt3,  '50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 > 0 or Amt2 > 0 or Amt3 > 0) and PK is NULL group by KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, CC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, TTY, TransCode, ProdCode, AccYr, ReinName, ReinLoc, Stat, CatCode, Broker, RiskTerr, PTF)

insert into TransX (KeyID,Yr,Period,Co,GL,TP,PC,BusCat,TTY,UWYr,Crcy,Flex2,Division,Flex5,Flex8,Amt1,Amt3) (select KeyID + '-data3',Yr,Period,Co,GL,TP,PC,BusCat,TTY,UWYr,Crcy,Flex2,Division,Flex5,Flex8,Amt1,Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Yr <> [Yr] and SUBSTRING(GL,1,1) = '4' and Flex1 is NULL)

insert into TransX (KeyID,Yr,Period,Co,GL,TP,PC,BusCat,TTY,UWYr,Crcy,Flex2,Division,Flex5,Flex8,Amt2,Amt4) (select KeyID + '-data3',Yr,Period,Co,GL,TP,PC,BusCat,TTY,UWYr,Crcy,Flex2,Division,Flex5,Flex8,Amt1,Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Yr = [Yr] and SUBSTRING(GL,1,1) = '4' and Flex1 is NULL)

insert into TransX (KeyID,Yr,Period,Co,GL,TP,PC,BusCat,TTY,UWYr,Crcy,Flex2,Division,Flex5,Flex8,Amt5,Amt7) (select KeyID + '-data3',Yr,Period,Co,GL,TP,PC,BusCat,TTY,UWYr,Crcy,Flex2,Division,Flex5,Flex8,Amt1,Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Yr <> [Yr] and GL < '4010000' and Flex1 is NULL)

insert into TransX (KeyID,Yr,Period,Co,GL,TP,PC,BusCat,TTY,UWYr,Crcy,Flex2,Division,Flex5,Flex8,Amt6,Amt8) (select KeyID + '-data3',Yr,Period,Co,GL,TP,PC,BusCat,TTY,UWYr,Crcy,Flex2,Division,Flex5,Flex8,Amt1,Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Yr = [Yr] and GL <  '4010000' and Flex1 is NULL)

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, CC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, TTY, TransCode, ProdCode, AccYr, ReinName, ReinLoc, Stat, CatCode, Broker, RiskTerr, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, CC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, TTY, TransCode, ProdCode, AccYr, ReinName, ReinLoc, Stat, CatCode, Broker, RiskTerr, PTF, round(-sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(coalesce(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2,  round(-sum(coalesce(Amt3,0)),2) as Amt3,  '40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 < 0 or Amt2 < 0 or Amt3 < 0) and PK is NULL group by KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, CC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, TTY, TransCode, ProdCode, AccYr, ReinName, ReinLoc, Stat, CatCode, Broker, RiskTerr, PTF)

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, CC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, TTY, TransCode, ProdCode, AccYr, ReinName, ReinLoc, Stat, CatCode, Broker, RiskTerr, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Co, (substring(GL,1,3) + '00' + substring(GL,6,2)) as GL, Crcy, '' as TP, PC, CC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, TTY, TransCode, ProdCode, AccYr, ReinName, ReinLoc, Stat, CatCode, Broker, RiskTerr, PTF, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2, round(-Amt3,2) as Amt3,'50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '40' and substring(GL,4,2) = '89' and TP <> '' )

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, CC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, TTY, TransCode, ProdCode, AccYr, ReinName, ReinLoc, Stat, CatCode, Broker, RiskTerr, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Co, (substring(GL,1,3) + '00' + substring(GL,6,2)) as GL, Crcy, '' as TP, PC, CC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, TTY, TransCode, ProdCode, AccYr, ReinName, ReinLoc, Stat, CatCode, Broker, RiskTerr, PTF, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2, round(-Amt3,2) as Amt3,'40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '50' and substring(GL,4,2) = '89' and TP <> '')

insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,UWYr,Crcy,Flex2,Division,Flex5,Flex8,Amt1,Amt3) (select KeyID,'pass2' as Flex1,UWYr,Crcy,Flex2,Division,Flex5,Flex8,Amt1,Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Yr <> [Yr] and SUBSTRING(GL,1,1) = '4' and Flex1 is NULL)

insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,UWYr,Crcy,Flex2,Division,Flex5,Flex8,Amt6,Amt8) (select KeyID,'pass2' as Flex1,UWYr,Crcy,Flex2,Division,Flex5,Flex8,Amt1,Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL <  '4010000' and Flex1 is NULL)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 = 0 or Amt2 = 0)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2008' and PC = '5200000000' and GL = '2020000'
update TransX set BusCat = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'
update TransX set Flex2 = 'A'  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex2 = 'C' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (substring(GL,1,2) = '14' or BusCat like '3%')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Yr, Co, Crcy, GL, TP,PC,Flex2, TTY,UWYr,Amt1,Amt2,Flex3) (Select KeyID, Yr, Co, Crcy, GL, TP,PC,Flex2, TTY,UWYr, round(sum(COALESCE(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, round(sum(COALESCE(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2, 'pass2' as Flex3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Yr, Co, Crcy, GL, TP, PC, Flex2, TTY,UWYr)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex3 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex5 = p.Product from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Flex6 = Mapkey from TransX t inner join mapkeyranges m on t.GL >= m.fromGL and t.GL <=m.thruGL where keyID = '[batchID]' and mapkey like 'M1-_-%-%-%' and not mapkey like 'M1-_-%-%-%-%'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL

insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,UWYr,Crcy,Flex2,Division,Flex5,Flex8,Amt2,Amt4) (select KeyID,'pass2' as Flex1,UWYr,Crcy,Flex2,Division,Flex5,Flex8,Amt1,Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and SUBSTRING(GL,1,1) = '4' and Flex1 is NULL)

insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,UWYr,Crcy,Flex2,Division,Flex5,Flex8,Amt5,Amt7) (select KeyID,'pass2' as Flex1,UWYr,Crcy,Flex2,Division,Flex5,Flex8,Amt1,Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Yr <> [Yr] and GL < '4010000' and Flex1 is NULL)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and Flex1 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 is NULL

insert into TransX (KeyID, Yr, Period, Co, GL, PC, CC, BusCat, Flex1, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,Flex2) (Select KeyID, Yr, Period, Co, GL, PC, CC, BusCat, Flex1, round(sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, round(sum(coalesce(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2 , round(sum(coalesce(Amt3,0)),2) as Amt3, '' as Flex2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Yr, Period, Co, GL, PC, CC, BusCat, Flex1)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0
Update TransX set BusCat = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'
Update x set Crcy = c.Crcy From TransX x inner join Companies c on c.Co = x.Co where x.KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set PK = (case when Amt1 > 0 or Amt2 > 0 or Amt3 > 0 then '40' else '50' end) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set Date1 = EOMONTH(cast(period as varchar) + '/01/' + cast(yr as varchar),0), Date2 = format(SYSDATETIME(),'yyyy-MM-dd') where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set Ledger = '[version]' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set Ledger = '0' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'P'

with cte as (select YearPeriod,Qtr, row_number() over (partition by co,period,crcy order by GL,PC,CC) as row_nbr,dense_rank() over (partition by co order by period,crcy) + 1000000 as doc_nbr from TransX) update cte set Qtr = doc_nbr, YearPeriod = row_nbr
[ReplaceConnString][LockDownConnString]
delete from SAP_ledger_data where fiscal_year = [Yr] and ledger = (case when '[version]' = 'P' then '0' else '[version]' end)

insert into SAP_ledger_data (Co,fiscal_year,period,gl,ledger,doc_no,item_no,posting_date,entry_date,doc_user,doc_type,doc_hdr_text,crcy,post_key,doc_amt,lc_amt,lc2_amt,ref1,ref2,ref3,assignment,txt,profit_centre,cost_centre,bus_cat,trans_type,uwyr,broker,trade_ptr,ptf,contract,prod_code,vendor,tax_code,flex1,flex2,flex3,gl_crcy,gl_doc_amt,risk_terr,reins_loc,cat_code,acc_yr,reinsurer,status_code,lc3_amt,sub_prod,flex4) (select Co,Yr,period,gl,ledger,Qtr as doc_no,YearPeriod as item_no,Date1 as posting_date,Date2 as entry_date,user as doc_user,'0' as doc_type,'Budget Load' as doc_hdr_text,crcy,PK,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,'','','','','Budget Load' as txt,PC,CC,BusCat,'','','','','','','','','',flex1,flex2,flex3,crcy,Amt1,'','','','','','',0 as lc3_amt,'','' from [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX where  KeyID = '[batchID]')
[ReplaceConnString][OriginalConnString]

update TransX set Flex2 = '2 Realized Gains/Losses', Flex4 = 'M3-3-6-06-A-2' from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges m1 on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m1.MapKey = 'M3-3-6-06-A-2' and Flex2 is NULL
update TransX set Flex2 = 'Non-Investment', Flex4 = m1.MapKey from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges m1 on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m1.MapKey like 'M2-3-5-B-9%-1'

update TransX set Flex2 = 'Non-Investment', Flex4 = m1.MapKey from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges m1 on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m1.MapKey like 'M2-3-5-B-%-1' and SUBSTRING(m1.Mapkey,10,3) in ('710','720','721','760','820')

update TransX set Flex2 = 'Cash & Investment Related', Flex4 = m1.MapKey from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges m1 on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m1.MapKey like 'M2-3-5-B-%-1' and Flex2 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Flex1 is NULL
